positive: A whimsical, stylized forest scene featuring stylized glowing mushrooms, gentle bioluminescent flora, and abstract, intertwining vines. The composition should be centrally balanced and suitable for a repeating print pattern. Use a vibrant, nocturnal color palette of deep indigo, sapphire blue, lime green, and ethereal violet. The aesthetic should be a blend of Art Nouveau and modern graphic design, with clean, thick silhouettes and strong contrast. The style must be vector-graphic illustration, clean line art, perfect symmetry, flat design, high detail, suitable for screen printing, isolated on a plain white background.
negative: blur, noisy, artifact, low detail, text, watermark, logo, signature, extra limbs, bad anatomy, photorealistic, oil painting, sketch, 3d rendering, messy, graffiti
